_readme: Every folder under drafts/ must have an entry here. Statuses: pending (art generated, lesson not yet resolved - blocks new generation), scheduled (held for a future release_date), published, rejected-quality, rejected-duplicate, transferred (moved to a sister site). Validated by scripts/check-drafts-ledger.py; scripts/preflight-image-generation.py locks a slug here before any image generation.

cartoon-boombox.note: Reviewed six-panel marker boombox process promoted after cropped-frame, process-plan, delivery-image, JSON-LD, link, and layout checks.

cartoon-popcorn-bucket.note: Slug locked for image generation by preflight; resolve before any new subject.

cartoon-rattlesnake.note: Approved six-panel marker contact sheet was cropped and wired into the July 16 tutorial after process and image review.

cartoon-superhero-mask.note: Reviewed six-panel superhero-mask process promoted after final-panel guide cleanup, cropped-frame, process-plan, delivery-image, JSON-LD, link, and layout checks.

cartoon-surfboard.note: Slug locked for image generation by preflight; resolve before any new subject.

cartoon-treasure-chest.note: Reviewed six-panel marker chest process promoted after cropped-frame, process-plan, delivery-image, JSON-LD, link, and layout checks.

cartoon-yo-yo-in-motion.note: Approved six-panel marker contact sheet was cropped and wired into the honest May 26 archive tutorial after process and image review.

comic-megaphone.note: Rejected before image generation because the July 13 cartoon boombox made the audio-device category too recent; no megaphone art was generated.

comic-sun-with-sunglasses.note: Reviewed six-panel sunglasses-sun process promoted after cropped-frame, process-plan, delivery-image, JSON-LD, link, and layout checks.

soccer-cleat.note: Generated after preflight, then set aside before publication because the July 8 current slot was occupied by cartoon-alarm-clock during the same run. Draft sheet retained outside public navigation.
